# BossBoard

> Mobile-first compliance and business management app for New Zealand tradespeople. Jobs, teams, compliance and cashflow in one app.

## About

BossBoard (also known as TradeMate NZ) is a mobile-first micro-SaaS platform built for New Zealand tradies and small service businesses — plumbers, electricians, builders, landscapers, and other trades. It replaces the patchwork of spreadsheets, paper forms, and multiple apps with a single affordable tool that handles compliance, invoicing, quoting, job tracking, and team management.

Built by Instilligent Limited, BossBoard leverages AI to generate compliant Safe Work Method Statements (SWMS) and surface business insights. It is designed to work offline-first via React Native with local SQLite storage, syncing when connectivity is available.

Target market: 100,000-150,000 NZ SMEs in the trades and service sectors.

## Features

- AI-powered SWMS generation compliant with the Health and Safety at Work Act 2015
- Professional invoicing with GST built in, payment tracking, and overdue invoice chasing
- Quotes and estimates with one-tap conversion to invoices
- Job logging with clock in/out, per-site and per-worker time tracking
- Team management with invites, role assignment, and job allocation
- Photo documentation with GPS tagging, attached to jobs, invoices, and SWMS
- Certification and licence tracking with automated expiry alerts
- Expense tracking
- Dashboard with revenue insights and basic cashflow overview (Xero integration + full cashflow forecasting coming Q2 2026)
- Offline-first mobile app (iOS and Android via React Native / Expo)

## Pricing

All prices in NZD. No contracts, cancel anytime.

- **Free**: $0 forever — 3 invoices/month, 2 SWMS/month, basic dashboard
- **Tradie**: $4.99/week (~$19.99/month) — unlimited everything, single user
- **Team**: $9.99/week (~$39.99/month) — everything plus up to 5 team members

## Technology

- Mobile: React Native (Expo) with SQLite offline storage
- Backend: Node.js / Express with TypeScript
- Database: PostgreSQL 16 with Redis caching
- AI: Anthropic Claude API for compliance document generation
- Payments: Stripe NZ
- Hosting: Railway
